text:
Space character is needed between "Window" and "Maker". Thus update 
would like to be as follows:

--- /usr/ports/current/graphics/wmicons/pkg/COMMENT	Sun Jun 27 20:32:59 1999
+++ ./pkg/COMMENT	Sun Dec  5 20:01:27 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-Icons for mailny used in WindowMaker
+Icons for mainly used in Window Maker
